title: The Lost Tourist
description: Directions, transport, and prepositions of movement. A lost tourist finds Amazing School thanks to Bia.
summary_pt_br: Direções em inglês: go straight, turn left/right, take the second street, cross, between, opposite, on the corner. Preposições de movimento (to, into, through, across, along).

scenes.text_en:
A tourist stopped Bia on the boardwalk.
'Excuse me — how do I GET TO Amazing School?'
'GO STRAIGHT for two blocks,' Bia said,
'TURN LEFT at the ice-cream shop, CROSS the small square,
and the school is ON THE CORNER, OPPOSITE the surf shop.'
scenes.text_pt:
Um turista parou a Bia no calçadão.
'Com licença — como chego à Amazing School?'
'SIGA RETO por dois quarteirões,' disse a Bia,
'VIRE À ESQUERDA na sorveteria, ATRAVESSE a pracinha,
e a escola está NA ESQUINA, EM FRENTE à loja de surf.'

items.term: by bus / by car / by bike / by plane
items.pt: de ônibus / de carro / de bicicleta / de avião

scenes.title: By foot? No — ON foot.
scenes.body_en: For most transport: BY + vehicle (by car, by bus, by plane). Exception: ON FOOT for walking. Brazilians often say 'by foot' — wrong. Also: you GET ON/OFF a bus but GET IN/OUT OF a car. The rule: bigger vehicles you can stand up in → on/off.
scenes.body_pt: Transporte: BY + veículo (by car, by bus). EXCEÇÃO: ON FOOT (a pé). Erro clássico: 'by foot' — não existe. E: get ON/OFF ônibus/trem (grandes), get IN/OUT OF carro/táxi (pequenos).

examples.en: I go to school on foot. She goes by bus.
examples.pt: Eu vou a pé. Ela vai de ônibus.

examples.en: Get in the car. Get on the bus.
examples.pt: Entre no carro. Suba no ônibus.

exercise.question: Complete: 'I come to school ___ foot every day.'
exercise.explanation: ON FOOT — fixed expression, always with ON.

exercise.question: 'The bakery is ___ the pharmacy and the bank.'
exercise.explanation: BETWEEN for two specific landmarks on each side.

turns.en: Do you come by bike or by bus?
turns.pt: Você vem de bike ou de ônibus?

turns.en: Usually on foot. It's only 10 minutes.
turns.pt: Geralmente a pé. Dá uns 10 minutos.

exercise.question: Complete: "Of ___. Where do you want to go?"
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "Of course. Where do you want to go?"

exercise.question: Pick the best response. ('Siga reto por duas quadras.')
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "Go straight for two blocks."

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Excuse me, I am lost. Can you help me?
turns.pt: Com licença, estou perdido. Pode ajudar?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Of course. Where do you want to go?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I am looking for the bus station.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, it is just two minutes away.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thank you so much. You saved my day.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: You are welcome. Enjoy your trip.

scenes.title: Listening story — The Lost Tourist
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Tourist and a student. Directions, transport, and prepositions of movement. A lost tourist finds Amazing School thanks to Bia. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Tourist
paragraphs.en: Excuse me, I am lost. Can you help me?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Of course. Where do you want to go?

paragraphs.speaker: Tourist
paragraphs.en: I am looking for the bus station.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Tourist. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "The Lost Tourist". Directions, transport, and prepositions of movement. A lost tourist finds Amazing School thanks to Bia. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "The Lost Tourist". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'The Lost Tourist'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "The Lost Tourist".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: VOA Learning English · Everyday Grammar
sources.pt_hint: Vídeos curtos sobre gramática do dia a dia.
